name: ESCALON MEDICAL CORP
business: Escalon Medical Corp. specializes in the development, manufacture, marketing, and distribution of medical devices for ophthalmic applications, including ultrasound diagnostic equipment (A-Scan, B-Scan, UBM, Pachymeters), intraocular gases, disposable surgical packs, and the AXIS Image Management system.

exposures.sentence: The Company operates in the healthcare market, specializing in the development, manufacture, marketing and distribution of medical devices for ophthalmic applications.
